hooks.command: $handoff = Get-ChildItem -Path '.' -Filter 'handoff-*.md' | Sort-Object LastWriteTime -Descending | Select-Object -First 1; if ($handoff) { $age = (Get-Date) - $handoff.LastWriteTime; if ($age.TotalHours -lt 8) { Write-Output ('{"systemMessage": "Handoff up to date: ' + $handoff.Name + '"}') } else { Write-Output '{"systemMessage": "HANDOFF NOT UPDATED: Update handoff-*.md or run WDS /wrap before closing."}' } } else { Write-Output '{"systemMessage": "NO HANDOFF FILE: Create a handoff file before closing."}' }
